geo-content-optimization.label: GEO 内容优化
geo-content-optimization.description: 优化文章结构、关键词密度，让 AI 搜索引擎优先引用你的内容
geo-content-optimization.prompt:
请帮我做一次 GEO（生成式引擎优化）内容优化。针对以下内容，请从文章结构、信息密度、问答形式匹配、关键词分布等维度进行调整，提升其在 AI 搜索引擎（如 Perplexity, SearchGPT 等）中的引用和展现概率：

[在此输入需要优化的内容]

long-tail-keyword-strategy.label: 长尾关键词策略
long-tail-keyword-strategy.description: 挖掘高价值长尾词，制定 AI 搜索占位策略
long-tail-keyword-strategy.prompt: 请针对 [在此输入你的行业/产品] 进行高价值长尾关键词挖掘，并制定一份针对 AI 搜索引擎（GEO）的搜索占位策略。要求包含：用户搜索意图分析、长尾词列表（按流量和竞争度排序）、推荐的内容创作方向。

ai-search-ranking-analysis.label: AI 搜索排名分析
ai-search-ranking-analysis.description: 追踪内容在 AI 搜索引擎中的引用率和排名变化
ai-search-ranking-analysis.prompt: 我想分析我的品牌/产品 [在此输入品牌或产品名] 在主流 AI 搜索引擎（如 ChatGPT, Perplexity 等）中的可见度和排名表现。请帮我设计一套分析框架，说明我该如何追踪引用率、分析提及趋势，以及如何对比竞品。

competitor-geo-benchmarking.label: 竞品 GEO 对标
competitor-geo-benchmarking.description: 分析同类竞品在 AI 搜索中的表现，拆解优化策略
competitor-geo-benchmarking.prompt: 请帮我对比分析 [在此输入你的品牌/产品] 与竞品 [在此输入竞品名称] 在 AI 搜索引擎中的品牌心智表现。我们需要分析竞品为什么会被 AI 优先推荐，并拆解出我们可以借鉴的 GEO 优化策略。

short-video-script-creation.label: 短视频脚本创作
short-video-script-creation.description: 从钩子到节奏，生成可直接录制口播的脚本
short-video-script-creation.prompt:
请帮我写一份短视频口播脚本。主题是：[在此输入主题]，目标观众为：[在此输入人群/画像]。要求：
1. 黄金3秒黄金钩子（Hook）吸引注意力。
2. 节奏紧凑，痛点分析透彻，给出一个明确的解决方案。
3. 结尾有行动号召（CTA）。
4. 适合 60 秒内的口播时长。

graphic-content-creation.label: 图文内容制作
graphic-content-creation.description: 公众号长图文、小红书卡片，统一风格批量产出
graphic-content-creation.prompt:
请帮我制作一份小红书图文笔记的排版大纲与内容文案。主题是：[在此输入主题]。要求包括：
1. 爆款小红书标题（提供3-5个备选）。
2. 每一张卡片的视觉排版建议与核心文案。
3. 正文文案（多用 emoji、分段清晰、带话题标签）。

viral-topic-planning.label: 爆款选题策划
viral-topic-planning.description: 针对多平台特征，生成高潜选题方案
viral-topic-planning.prompt: 请帮我为我的账号（定位是：[在此输入你的账号定位]）策划 5 个爆款选题。要求分析每个选题的流量密码、适合发布的平台（如抖音、小红书、视频号），并给出大致的脚本切入点。

content-data-diagnosis.label: 内容数据诊断
content-data-diagnosis.description: 分析完播率、互动率，输出「停什么/改什么」清单
content-data-diagnosis.prompt: 我目前的内容遇到了瓶颈。这是我最近发布内容的数据情况：[在此输入或上传完播率、互动率、新增关注等数据]。请帮我诊断数据背后的原因，并生成一份清晰的“停止做什么”和“开始改做什么”的优化清单。

ip-persona-positioning.label: IP 人设定位
ip-persona-positioning.description: 基于行业经验、性格特质，精准定位 IP 人设和内容赛道
ip-persona-positioning.prompt: 我是一名 [在此输入职业/背景]，我的核心优势有：[在此输入核心优势]。我想打造个人 IP。请帮我进行 IP 人设定位分析，为我规划最适合的内容赛道、人设标签、标志性话术，以及商业化路径。

90-day-content-calendar.label: 90 天内容日历
90-day-content-calendar.description: 从 IP 定位出发，规划整个季度的内容排期
90-day-content-calendar.prompt: 请帮我规划一份个人 IP 90天（一个季度）的内容日历大纲。我的定位是：[在此输入定位]，周更频率为：[在此输入每周发布几条]。要求内容日历合理分配科普干货、日常随笔、成功案例以及营销节点。

customer-acquisition-copywriting.label: 获客型文案输出
customer-acquisition-copywriting.description: 让客户看完想找你聊的获客文案，批量产出
customer-acquisition-copywriting.prompt: 请帮我撰写一篇用于个人 IP 朋友圈/社群的获客型文案。目标是推广我的产品/服务：[在此输入推广内容]。文案要真诚、不显得生硬推销，同时能直击客户痛点，引导他们主动评论或私信我进行咨询。

ip-visual-system-setup.label: IP 视觉体系搭建
ip-visual-system-setup.description: 统一的头像、封面模板、排版风格，全平台一致
ip-visual-system-setup.prompt: 我想统一我所有社交媒体平台（微信、抖音、小红书等）的 IP 视觉形象。请帮我策划一套视觉体系方案，包括：适合我人设的配色方案、头像风格方向、视频封面排版版式设计建议，以及排版规范。

community-ops-sop.label: 社群运营 SOP
community-ops-sop.description: 设计欢迎语、日常话术、活动节奏，标准化流程
community-ops-sop.prompt: 请帮我设计一套私域社群（主题是：[在此输入社群定位，如产品内测群、行业交流群]）的运营 SOP 流程。包含：新成员进群的欢迎语、群规、群内每日互动的话术，以及每周的固定活动节奏。

moments-content-matrix.label: 朋友圈内容矩阵
moments-content-matrix.description: 生活/干货/观点/成交四类内容，高频触达不招人烦
moments-content-matrix.prompt: 请帮我设计一个朋友圈内容矩阵规划。我的目标是建立信任并转化客户，请帮我规划如何分配“生活随笔”、“干货分享”、“深度观点”、“成交见证/广告”这四类内容的发布比例，并给出一周 7 天的示例内容模版。

1v1-conversion-playbook.label: 1v1 转化话术
1v1-conversion-playbook.description: 针对不同客户画像 and 阶段，设计个性化沟通话术
1v1-conversion-playbook.prompt: 请帮我写一套 1v1 私域沟通转化话术。产品/服务是：[在此输入]，目标客户此时处于 [在此输入客户所处阶段，如：咨询了价格但没购买，或：刚加微信的新粉]。请给出破冰话术、探寻需求话术、解决异议话术和临门一脚成交话术。

private-domain-data-dashboard.label: 私域数据看板
private-domain-data-dashboard.description: 新增、活跃、转化、流失，核心指标一目了然
private-domain-data-dashboard.prompt: 为了监控我的私域运营效果，我想设计一个私域运营数据分析看板。请帮我梳理：我必须追踪的核心指标（如日新增、社群互动率、转化率、流失率等），以及每个指标代表的业务意义和分析维度。

geo-content-optimization.label: GEO Content Optimization
geo-content-optimization.description: Optimize article structure and keyword density to prioritize references by AI search engines
geo-content-optimization.prompt:
Please help me perform a GEO (Generative Engine Optimization) content optimization. For the following content, please adjust from dimensions such as article structure, information density, Q&A format matching, and keyword distribution to improve its citation and visibility probability in AI search engines (like Perplexity, SearchGPT, etc.):

[Enter content to optimize here]

long-tail-keyword-strategy.label: Long-tail Keyword Strategy
long-tail-keyword-strategy.description: Dig high-value long-tail keywords and formulate AI search occupancy strategy
long-tail-keyword-strategy.prompt: Please mine high-value long-tail keywords for [Enter your industry/product here] and formulate a search occupancy strategy targeted at AI search engines (GEO). Requirements include: user search intent analysis, long-tail keyword list (sorted by volume and competitiveness), and recommended content direction.

ai-search-ranking-analysis.label: AI Search Ranking Analysis
ai-search-ranking-analysis.description: Track the citation rate and ranking changes of content in AI search engines
ai-search-ranking-analysis.prompt: I want to analyze the visibility and ranking performance of my brand/product [Enter brand or product name] in major AI search engines (like ChatGPT, Perplexity, etc.). Please help me design an analysis framework explaining how I can track citation rates, analyze mention trends, and benchmark against competitors.

competitor-geo-benchmarking.label: Competitor GEO Benchmarking
competitor-geo-benchmarking.description: Analyze performance of similar competitors in AI search and extract optimization strategies
competitor-geo-benchmarking.prompt: Please help me compare and analyze the brand mindshare performance of [Enter your brand/product] vs competitor [Enter competitor name] in AI search engines. We need to analyze why competitors are preferred by AI and extract GEO optimization strategies we can adopt.

short-video-script-creation.label: Short Video Script
short-video-script-creation.description: Generate scripts directly ready for recording from hook to rhythm
short-video-script-creation.prompt:
Please help me write a short video spoken script. The theme is: [Enter theme here], target audience: [Enter audience/persona]. Requirements:
1. 3-second hook to grab attention.
2. Fast pace, solid pain points analysis, and clear solution.
3. Call to Action (CTA) at the end.
4. Suitable for under 60 seconds duration.

graphic-content-creation.label: Graphic Content Creation
graphic-content-creation.description: Mass production of official accounts long articles and RED cards with unified style
graphic-content-creation.prompt:
Please help me create a layout outline and copy draft for a Xiaohongshu (RED) post. The theme is: [Enter theme here]. Requirements include:
1. Viral Xiaohongshu titles (provide 3-5 options).
2. Visual layout suggestions and core copy for each card.
3. Content copy (use emojis, clear paragraphs, hashtags).

viral-topic-planning.label: Viral Topic Planning
viral-topic-planning.description: Generate high-potential topic schemes targeting multiple platforms features
viral-topic-planning.prompt: Please help me plan 5 viral topics for my account (focused on: [Enter account positioning]). Analyze the traffic formula for each topic, suitable platforms (e.g. Douyin, RED, Channels), and general script entry points.

content-data-diagnosis.label: Content Data Diagnosis
content-data-diagnosis.description: Analyze completion and engagement rate, output 'what to stop/what to change' list
content-data-diagnosis.prompt: My content growth has hit a bottleneck. Here is data from my recent posts: [Enter or upload retention rate, engagement rate, new followers, etc.]. Please help me diagnose the reasons behind the data and generate a clear 'what to stop' and 'what to change' optimization list.

ip-persona-positioning.label: IP Persona Positioning
ip-persona-positioning.description: Accurately position IP persona and content track based on industry experience and personality traits
ip-persona-positioning.prompt: I am a [Enter profession/background], my core strengths are: [Enter core strengths]. I want to build a personal IP. Please perform an IP persona positioning analysis for me, planning the most suitable content track, persona tags, sign-off catchphrases, and monetization path.

90-day-content-calendar.label: 90-day Content Calendar
90-day-content-calendar.description: Plan content schedules for the entire quarter starting from IP positioning
90-day-content-calendar.prompt: Please help me plan a personal IP 90-day (one quarter) content calendar outline. My positioning is: [Enter positioning], update frequency is: [Enter posts per week]. The calendar should distribute educational content, daily thoughts, success cases, and marketing milestones.

customer-acquisition-copywriting.label: Acquisition Copywriting
customer-acquisition-copywriting.description: Generate customer acquisition copywriting in bulk that makes clients want to chat with you
customer-acquisition-copywriting.prompt: Please help me write a customer acquisition copy for personal IP Moments/communities. The goal is to promote my product/service: [Enter promotion details]. The copy should feel authentic, not pushy, directly hit customer pain points, and encourage them to comment or private message for consultation.

ip-visual-system-setup.label: IP Visual System Setup
ip-visual-system-setup.description: Unified avatars, cover templates, layout styles, consistent across all platforms
ip-visual-system-setup.prompt: I want to unify my IP visual identity across all social media platforms (WeChat, Douyin, RED, etc.). Please help me plan a visual system scheme, including: color palette matching my persona, avatar style, video cover layout templates, and formatting specs.

community-ops-sop.label: Community SOP
community-ops-sop.description: Design welcome messages, daily talk scripts, activity rhythm, standardized processes
community-ops-sop.prompt: Please help me design a set of operations SOP for my private domain community (focused on: [Enter community positioning, e.g. beta test group, industry group]). Include: welcome message for new members, group rules, daily interaction scripts, and weekly activities.

moments-content-matrix.label: Moments Content Matrix
moments-content-matrix.description: Distribute life/insights/opinions/promotion contents high frequency without being annoying
moments-content-matrix.prompt: Please help me design a content matrix for Moments. My goal is to build trust and convert. Please plan how to allocate ratios of 'daily life', 'valuable tips', 'in-depth opinions', and 'success showcases/ads', and provide a 7-day sample template.

1v1-conversion-playbook.label: 1v1 Conversion Script
1v1-conversion-playbook.description: Design personalized communication script targeting different customer personas and stages
1v1-conversion-playbook.prompt: Please help me write a 1v1 private domain communication script. The product/service is: [Enter], target customer is at [Enter customer stage, e.g. asked about price but didn't buy, or newly added follower]. Provide icebreakers, need exploration scripts, objection handling, and closing scripts.

private-domain-data-dashboard.label: Private Domain Dashboard
private-domain-data-dashboard.description: New, active, conversion, churn, key metrics at a glance
private-domain-data-dashboard.prompt: To monitor my private domain operations, I want to design a dashboard. Please help me list: core metrics I must track (like daily new, community interaction rate, conversion rate, churn rate, etc.), their business meanings, and analysis dimensions.
